assumptions.normalization: Pixel values used as-is from dataset, range ~[0.34, 0.77]
assumptions.input_model: L-inf box constraints on pixel values
assumptions.P1_input_region: Per-pixel [min, max] from near-centered dataset images (|CTE| < 1.0m)
assumptions.P2_input_region: L-inf ball of radius 0.02 around each training image, clipped to [0,1]
assumptions.P2_image_selection: Near-centered training images (|CTE| < 2.0) from VerifyGAN dataset (y_train/X_train)
assumptions.data_note: HDF5 naming is swapped: y_train=images, X_train=labels
assumptions.preprocessing_note: No additional normalization applied beyond what is in the .nnet file

hurdles: V1 used synthetic C_centered region [0.0,0.3]/[0.7,1.0] which was too loose
V2 uses data-driven per-pixel bounds for more realistic verification
